concept.title: Authentication
concept.shortdesc: Authenticate requests using an API key sent in the Authorization header.

section.title: API key header
section.p: Send your API key as a Bearer token:

section.title: Idempotency
section.p: For create/update operations, provide an Idempotency-Key header to safely retry requests.
Keys are scoped to an endpoint and expire after 24 hours.
